rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LEONARD ESPOSTO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Probate Code Section 11604 Petition To Deduct The Fees And Costs Incurred By The Petitioners From The Distributions Otherwise Payable To Respondents Gayle Mazza And Nancy Hill For Their Breaches Of The Stipulation For Settlement, And To Pay Those Fees And Costs To The Petitioners Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required for the SOLE PURPOSE of Counsel hand-delivering courtesy copies of papers filed on 7/24/19 or later in connection with (or in response to) the 11604 petition. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.93 G.] (Only three declarations filed on 7/26/19 and two versions of a proof of service filed on 8/30/19 have been received by the reviewing Examiner as of 17:00 on 9/10/19. The only proper form of notice is the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing, on the reverse side of which is the proof of service. The statement about a paralegal's qualification should be made by the supervising attorney. The party entitled to notice must direct in writing that notice be given to his/her attorney; the attorney's declaration does not meet the requirements of CRC 7.51(a)(2).)
